products.title: Specfin Hybrid Hedge Fund
products.description: Multi-strategy hedge fund combining traditional quant strategies with on-chain DeFi yield.
products.longDescription: The Specfin Hybrid Hedge Fund deploys capital across three core strategies: algorithmic market-making, real-world asset tokenization, and DeFi protocol yield optimization. All positions are recorded on-chain for full transparency.

products.title: Korea Real Estate RWA Fund
products.description: Tokenized Korean commercial real estate portfolio with quarterly distributions.
products.longDescription: Invest in a diversified portfolio of tokenized Korean commercial properties. Each token represents fractional ownership with full legal backing through an SPV structure registered in Singapore.

products.title: Spectra Token Public Sale
products.description: SPECTRA is the governance and fee-sharing token for the Specfin platform ecosystem.
products.longDescription: SPECTRA token holders receive a share of platform trading fees, governance voting rights, and priority access to new investment opportunities. Token vesting: 20% at TGE, 80% over 12 months.

siteConfig.heroTitle: The bridge between institutional capital and digital assets
siteConfig.heroSubtitle: Specfin Technologies is the institutional-grade hybrid investment platform connecting accredited investors with tokenized real-world assets and on-chain hedge fund strategies.
siteConfig.announcementBanner: Phase 1 is now open - limited spots for accredited investors
